headline: These Analysts Increase Their Forecasts On Charles River After Better-Than-Expected Q1 Results
summary: Charles River Laboratories (NYSE: CRL) beat Q1 earnings estimates but lowered its FY2026 forecast. Analysts maintain positive outlook with raised price targets.

headline: Barclays Maintains Overweight on Charles River, Raises Price Target to $220
summary: Barclays  analyst Luke Sergott   maintains Charles River (NYSE:CRL) with a Overweight and raises the price target from $210 to $220.
